content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:10 contains "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive tied to a star rating.
Pierre: Apple explicitly prohibits offering rewards in exchange for reviews or specifically for 5-star ratings, since this manipulates the App Store's rating system and misleads other users. This string directly ties a free premium week to leaving a 5-star review, which is a clear 2.3.9 violation. Remove the review-incentive text entirely, and if you want to encourage feedback, use the standard `SKStoreReviewController` prompt without any reward tied to it.
